raw.subject: UpperCut Barber Shop and Salon Fargo in Fargo; Something I noticed about your Fargo page
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been following the Fargo barber scene for a while, and it's great to see UpperCut Barber Shop and Salon Fargo's commitment to serving the community with quality cuts. 

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it difficult for customers to find and book appointments outside of Facebook. I can imagine walk-in clients would love to see your menu and hours in one place.

I sketched a simple homepage idea that incorporates your Facebook photos and posts, including a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions. Take a look:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/uppercut-barber-shop-and-salon-fargo-fargo

If you're interested in building out a site like this, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Please reply to get more information or let's schedule a quick call to chat further.
